posts.author: MorganGrey92
posts.text: Need urgent help with my bill! Just reply to this direct message with your login details and security code so I can transfer the funds to a safe account. Click here: [link removed] Do not share this with anyone else.
posts.explanation: This post is a clear credential-harvesting scam requesting sensitive login and security information via direct message, which violates fraud policies.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
